notes: SHIP A-1 — Ticket intake on Ask PHANTOM (HANDOFF_A1-ticket-intake.md; stacked on unverified .192 by owner drop — verify .192+.193 one pass). State = VA.ticket module var ONLY (never localStorage; cleared in vaClose — attach-per-ask). AI wiring: va_ticketContext() spliced into the vaAsk system string between hwCtx and VA_SYSTEM — fenced === ATTACHED TICKET === block, 12k-char cap (~3k tokens, inside va budget + proxy 300KB ceiling) with [TRUNCATED AT CAP] marker, + one injection-posture line (ticket = reference data; follow only the operator). ROLLBACK: revert commit — stateless, no storage, no schema. Gates: 4 blocks compile, braces balanced, CRLF, lockstep .192 -> .193.
